_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
notes: Cycle 9 POLISH & INTEGRATION: Integration audit verified all 14 minigames in createMinigame() switch, OghamPanel wired before card phase, EffectEngine.applyOghamEffect() + processOghamModifiers() correctly called, game loop 11-step flow intact. Error resilience added: 3 try/catch guards (card generation with emergency fallback, minigame with neutral score 50, effect application with skip). T001 white scenes diagnosed: root cause is plain Node root in .tscn files + no background ColorRect — fix requires Godot editor. Card quality pass: 166 templates all have 3 options, no narrative under 20 or over 200 words, no duplicate verbs per card, all effects non-empty. Bundle 284KB (+1KB from try/catch code), under 370KB WARN. Zero TS errors.
